creator: trevor@jpj.net
text:
> In addition, CATEGORIES for a 'X desktop entartainment' similar to
> this port should be 'games'.

I haven't tried the program, but I've read the documentation for it, and I
gather that it is non-interactive.  I feel that things which can't be
played do not belong in the "games" category.  This program seems to be
similar to xantfarm or xmascot, and less similar to gbackbround, qrash,
xaniroc, xballoon, xsnow, xstarroll, or xtacy--all of which are in "x11"
and none of which are in "games".  Perhaps there are enough of these to
justify an "amusements" (or similar) category.  I'd be in favor of that.
-- 
Trevor Johnson
http://jpj.net/~trevor/gpgkey.txt
